items.title: England vs Argentina: Rivalry and revenge at the FIFA World Cup
items.summary: The intense Argentina and England football rivalry spans several World Cup matches. Key moments include the 1966 Rattin expulsion and Maradona's 1986 goals. David Beckham faced...

items.title: The 91-year-old Argentine journalist covering his 18th World Cup

items.title: Lehmann wants Steelbacks to 'live in the moment'
